## Review

**Agents and contributors:** Do **not** fill in **Approved by** or **Approved at** until the user or
maintainer has **explicitly approved** this ADR text after an architecture-related change (see
`docs/adr/README.md` and [ADR 0004](../adr/0004-documentation-and-adrs.md)).

| Field       | Value                                                    |
| ----------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| Approved by | (reviewer name or handle — only after explicit approval) |
| Approved at | `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ` (UTC — when approval was given)   |
